notes: Realistic test prompts covering the skill's main workflows. Use with skill-creator's eval loop. Add `assertions` arrays later once you've seen a baseline run.

evals.name: deep-stock-research-nvda
evals.prompt: Do a deep research workup on NVDA. I want short/mid/long-term views and want to know what would kill each thesis. I'm aggressive so don't sugarcoat it.
evals.expected_output: A .docx equity research report (or structured chat response) covering all 7 phases, culminating in three horizon-specific rating blocks each with a WHAT KILLS THIS TRADE line. Quantitative depth in fundamentals and technicals. MCP-first data sourcing visible in the tool use.

evals.name: portfolio-review-from-excel
evals.prompt: Here's my portfolio (attached). Review it with an aggressive growth lens and tell me what to do.
evals.expected_output: Portfolio parsed and confirmed back as a table. Per-position assessment for top 10 holdings. Concentration, beta, drawdown scenarios. Action matrix with specific triggers and timelines. Every aggressive recommendation paired with a quantified risk callout.

evals.name: portfolio-review-from-screenshot
evals.prompt: Check this screenshot of my Robinhood holdings. What should I change?
evals.expected_output: Portfolio extracted from image via vision. Confirmed back as a table. Full portfolio review with actionable recommendations. Handles the fact that screenshots may be missing cost basis.

evals.name: etf-analysis-soxx
evals.prompt: Is SOXX a good addition for an aggressive growth portfolio? Already own QQQ and some individual semi names.
evals.expected_output: One-pager analysis of SOXX. Crucially identifies overlap with QQQ and individual semi holdings — the answer needs to address redundancy, not just 'yes it's good.' Rating block with role fit, conviction, and what kills the trade.

evals.name: sector-brief-semiconductors
evals.prompt: Give me a sector brief on semiconductors. I want to know the best aggressive bet in the space right now.
evals.expected_output: Sector composition, aggregates, regime fit, peer table sorted by composite score, entry vehicle recommendations ranked by conviction and risk, verdict with WHAT KILLS THIS CALL.

evals.name: options-flow-tsla
evals.prompt: What's the options setup on TSLA look like for next month's expiry?
evals.expected_output: IV level + rank, put/call ratios, max pain, magnet strikes, implied move, unusual activity flags. Aggressive-lens suggested play with strike/expiry guidance and a quantified max-loss callout. Explicit options-specific risk warning.

evals.name: rebalance-plan-after-review
evals.prompt: Based on the portfolio review you just did, give me a concrete rebalancing plan — what to do, when, and at what prices.
evals.expected_output: Full action matrix table with Action / Ticker / Size / Trigger / Deadline / Risk columns. Order of operations (sells first, hedges second, buys last). Tax awareness if cost basis was provided. Top-3 plain-English summary at the end.

evals.name: quick-stock-check
evals.expected_output: Short chat response (5-10 lines), not a full report. Current price, recent move context, near-term catalyst, brief view. Should NOT kick off a full 7-phase deep-dive for a casual question.
